sharingOwnerRules.description: new Sharing rule on Opportunity object to share the Opportunities owned by SVP Sales & Marketing Role users to both Sales Rep North and Sales Rep South Role users.
sharingOwnerRules.label: Opportunity share to sales rep North

sharingOwnerRules.description: new Sharing rule on Opportunity object to share the Opportunities owned by SVP Sales & Marketing Role users to both Sales Rep North and Sales Rep South Role users.
sharingOwnerRules.label: Opportunity share to sales rep South
